events.name: Business Analytics Certification (CBAP) Training in San Gregorio, CA
events.description: Advance your career as a business analyst! Attend our CBAP Classroom Bootcamp and gain real-world business analytics skills.
events.organizer_description: We're iCertGlobal, a global leader in professional certification training and education. Our mission is to empower professionals and teams by providing high-quality, accessible training in today's most in-demand fields.Our events are designed to help you prepare for and pass globally recognized certification exams. We specialize in Project Management, IT Service Management, Agile & Scrum, and emerging technologies. Join our sessions to learn from certified instructors and take the next step in your career.You can connect with us at www.icertglobal.com or write to us on info@icertglobal.comIf you'd like to receive our newsletter with exclusive content and new course announcements, be sure to opt-in for our marketing emails during checkout!

events.description: ​Ship It: Build & Launch Your App in One Afternoon
events.organizer_description: Welcome to AI Builders ! This meetup group is perfect for anyone interested in delving into the world of Artificial Intelligence.Whether you're looking to expand your knowledge on AI programming, discuss cutting-edge technologies, or collaborate with like-minded individuals, this is the perfect community for you.Join us for informative discussions, hands-on workshops, and networking opportunities to further your understanding of AI and explore its vast potential. Let's come together to build a future powered by AI innovation!

events.organizer_description: Tartufino is an intimate pop-up dining concept by Chef Shawn Phillips, bringing refined technique and seasonal ingredients into warm, thoughtfully curated dining experiences. Limited seating. Elevated flavors. Designed to be remembered.

events.description: Spotlights the groundbreaking ideas, tech, and leaders shaping the future of sports at the intersection of business, media, and innovation.

events.name: Stanford Sleep Apnea Course/Goode Lectureship
events.address: 500 Pasteur Drive 3 floor, Palo Alto, CA 94304
events.description: The Stanford Sleep Apnea Course makes its debut, presented by the Sleep Surgery Division of the Department of Otolaryngology
events.organizer_description: This course is a beginner to intermediate FEES course designed to provide foundational information in evaluation and  treatment of swallowing disorders using endoscopy.  There will be a “hands-on” session on Day 2 designed to give speech-language pathologists the opportunity to participate in techniques to optimize the instrumental examination.  The hands-on portion of the course will include MDs and expert SLPs.  To participate in the hands-on portion, you will be asked to volunteer to be scoped.  The lecture portion of the course consists of lectures, digital imaging, discussion, live demonstrations.  Don’t miss this opportunity to see and hear our impressive faculty.

events.description: The Stanford India Conference is the West Coast’s largest student-run forum on the U.S.–India strategic partnership.

events.name: CIS Children's Business Fair - Palo Alto, CA
events.description: Young entrepreneurs in Palo Alto showcase their amazing business ideas and have fun selling at the CIS Children's Business Fair!
events.organizer_description: At Creative Imagination Schoolhouse, we believe in nurturing each child's unique passions and interests. We foster a learning environment where children lead their own learning journeys, guided by caring adults through group discussions, open-ended activities, and interest-based projects. We cultivate a growth mindset, empowering every child to discover their voice, passion, and joy.We are collaborating with a dedicated community of families, local businesses, and organizations who share our vision of supporting children's entrepreneurial spirit. Together, we are making the Children's Business Fair a reality, where young entrepreneurs can showcase their creativity and business acumen.We invite you to join our team of passionate educators, mentors, and parents in supporting this inspiring event.

events.name: CSMA's Cover  Band Showcase
events.address: 230 San Antonio Circle, Mountain View, CA 94040
events.venue_name: Community School of Music and Arts
events.description: Get ready to rock out, enjoy the incredible talent of our students, and experience the energy of live band music!
events.organizer_name: Community School of Music and Arts (CSMA)
events.organizer_description: Community School of Music and Arts in Mountain View, CA is a regional center for the arts that inspires excellence through music and art education for people of all ages and abilities. Through our Community Concert Series we offer high-quality music experiences in our 200-seat, acoustically pleasing concert venue, Tateuchi Hall. We also offer a variety of free public events, such as family arts days, gallery shows, and special events throughout the year.
